summary: Iteration 20 — Frontend-only E2E for Settings refactor (no-regression), public package view /p/:slug/:code, lead capture flow, /app/leads management, and packages share button. All 18 critical checks passed. Cleanup of test lead 'cliente@e2e.com' completed (quote_requests + notifications kind=lead).
critical_code_review_comments: Two elements share data-testid='want-package-btn' (sticky header CTA + aside CTA uses 'want-package-btn-side'). Current selectors pick the first one which works fine; consider documenting this duality to avoid future test ambiguity.
Honeypot input in PublicPackage uses className='hidden' (Tailwind sets display:none) — works for bots but is also intentionally not testable; acceptable as-is.
Settings.jsx still acts as orchestrator and is ~160 LoC after refactor — well within the recommended <700 LoC threshold. Sub-components are clean and focused. Refactor looks good.
seed_data_creation: None — used existing GDL-TEQ-3N package and demo company 'aventurate'. Test lead with email cliente@e2e.com was created during test and removed in cleanup step.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All flows from iteration 20 are green. Verified: (a) Settings refactor preserves data-testids and behavior — margin-divisor save, email-provider toggle (resend/smtp/gmail sections render correctly), invalid notify_email blocks save with error, valid email saves OK, bank-section/bank-enabled-input render, logo-preview/upload-logo-btn render; (b) Public /p/aventurate/GDL-TEQ-3N renders pkg-title 'Guadalajara Clásica + Tequila 4 días', pkg-price '$5,800 MXN', itinerary/includes/excludes; want-package-btn opens modal, invalid email shows request-error, valid email + required fields shows request-success; (c) /p/aventurate/NOEXISTE shows pkg-public-error; (d) /app/leads via nav-leads displays lead, lead-attend-{id} changes pill to 'Atendida', lead-archive-{id} removes from active filter and shows in archived and all filters, lead-quote-{id} present; (e) /app/packages share-package-GDL-TEQ-3N button visible/clickable (dismissed any window.prompt fallback). Cleanup completed. Note: 401/404 console errors during /p navigation are expected (no auth on public route) — not a bug.
